_doc: Per-store-ID overrides for the scrapers. The scraper looks up each store ID here BEFORE geocoding. If an entry exists: (a) `geocode_query` (if set) replaces the auto-generated Nominatim query, (b) `lat`/`lng` (if set) skip geocoding entirely, (c) `store_type`/`status` (if set) override the auto-classification. Closed stores (status=closed) are dropped from the output entirely. Edit this file by hand when a store needs special handling — it persists across re-runs.
_decided_by_lindsay_2026_05_06: Drop closed stores. Include pop-ups but label them. Include coming-soon but label them. Include outlets and concessions.

lululemon-60136._note: Auto-classify caught coming_soon from name. Geocode query needed because 'Bullring (coming soon)' isn't a place.

lululemon-49174._note: Pop-up location. Auto-classify catches popup from name; query needed because 'Harajuku Pop-up' isn't a place.

lululemon-65190._note: Outlet at Wertheim Village (designer outlet near Frankfurt).

lululemon-50047._note: Direct Factory Outlet at Moorabbin (Melbourne suburb). The full street address didn't resolve in Nominatim — using the suburb centroid (city-level estimate is acceptable per Lindsay's 2026-05-06 decision).

lululemon-60203.geocode_query: Fenwick Department Store, Northumberland Street, Newcastle upon Tyne, UK
lululemon-60203._note: Concession on the 1st Floor Womenswear at Fenwick Newcastle.

lululemon-50596._note: Lululemon Outlet in Alexandria, a Sydney suburb. Default geocode kept matching Alexandria, Italy.

lululemon-60135._note: Failed in last run due to a transient Nominatim DNS error — keeping an override entry so future runs always resolve cleanly.

lululemon-72102._note: Was geocoded to Lyon-area coordinates because the city-hint search center was Lyon (lululemon.fr). Force a clean Milan-Italy lookup.
